Case Studies

Making sense of what is to help build what's next.

For more than 15 years, I've helped turn early ideas, complex systems, and messy product challenges into digital experiences people understand, use, and trust. My work sits between vision and execution: defining what needs to exist, designing the structure underneath it, and building the product with enough clarity to launch, scale, and hold up under pressure.

What I Help Teams Solve

Product Direction

Turning ambiguous product pressure into clear strategy, scope, and execution paths.

  • Vision framing
  • Roadmapping
  • Discovery systems
  • Executive narrative
  • Launch planning
  • Product critique

Systems Design

Designing reusable structures that let teams move faster without losing coherence.

  • Design systems
  • UX architecture
  • Component models
  • Content systems
  • Workflow design
  • Documentation

Design Engineering

Bridging design intent and production reality through prototypes, implementation, and QA.

  • Front-end builds
  • Prototype systems
  • Interaction models
  • Technical planning
  • Design QA
  • Handoff systems

Brands that trust my work.
